delays.title: Frontend team must handle other projects
Backend team must handle other projects

items.name: IG V5 backend take-over from outsource

images.file: landing page to car model list page flow.png
images.caption: Landing Page → Car Model List flow

phases.name: Phase 1 · Seller App
phases.goal: Deliver a working Seller App internal beta together with the backend foundation both apps will share.

milestones.name: Kickoff & key decisions
milestones.exit: All blocking decisions have owners and recorded answers; the scope baseline is approved.

tasks.text: Lock the MVP scope and the deferral order for both apps
Select the escrow provider; confirm payment-link, webhook, refund, and dispute capabilities
Confirm seller types, verification documents, and onboarding rules
Confirm the vehicle/compatibility data source and data ownership
Confirm English and Chinese as launch languages
Confirm minimum Android/iOS versions and the list of test devices
Approve the minimal admin dashboard scope
Set up task tracking and the weekly progress-reporting cadence

milestones.name: Seller App UI design — completed
milestones.exit: All Seller App screens are designed and exported. New design tasks are added here if scope changes.

tasks.text: Splash Screen + Login Page — UI design
Seller Profile — UI design
Car Profile — UI design
Spare-Part Profile — UI design
Car Accessories Profile — UI design
Car Plate — UI design
Car Switch-Sell — UI design
Location — UI design
Option-Address — UI design
Selection — UI design
Order Section (Seller) — UI design
Order Detail Content — UI design
Seller Chat Status — UI design

milestones.name: Platform & backend foundation
milestones.exit: Authenticated users and approved sellers exist through documented APIs on staging; app builds are distributed automatically.

tasks.text: Initialize the Laravel project: environments, CI, queues, cache, storage
Define API standards: versioning, validation, errors, pagination, OpenAPI docs
Implement social login (Apple, Google, Facebook, WeChat) and the token lifecycle
Implement users, profiles, devices, roles, and permissions
Implement seller onboarding: seller types, verification documents, status workflow
Implement address and region master data (Malaysia / China)
Implement the vehicle taxonomy (brand, series, variant, year) and its import pipeline
Implement media upload with storage, type, and size validation
Set up the staging environment and monitoring
Set up iOS/Android build pipelines and internal distribution
React Native Expo workspace setup
Google Play and App Store account setup

milestones.name: Seller App modules
milestones.exit: Every Seller App module works against the staging APIs.

tasks.text: App layout and navigation structure
Splash Screen + Login Page — seller login and registration
Seller Profile — view and edit profile
Business account setup — seller type and store setup
Selection — category, attribute, and vehicle compatibility pickers
Spare-Part Profile — spare part product create/edit
Car Accessories Profile — accessories product create/edit
Car Profile — used-car listing create/edit
Car Switch-Sell — switch car to sell flow
Car Plate — car plate listing create/edit
Location — map and region location picker (Malaysia / China)
Option-Address — address management
Product listing management — stock, price, publish/unpublish
Order Section (Seller) — order queues: unpaid, to ship, shipped, completed, cancelled, refunded
Order Detail Content — order detail with items, buyer info, and actions
Shipment — courier and tracking-number submission
Seller Chat — conversations, messages, product/order cards
Seller Chat — escrow payment-link sending and status display
Seller notifications and settings
Loading, empty, error, and offline states across all seller modules

milestones.name: Seller platform APIs
milestones.exit: All seller flows are supported by documented, policy-protected APIs.

tasks.text: Product/SKU models: categories, attributes, media, price, stock, publication
Product CRUD APIs with ownership and moderation status
Product-to-vehicle compatibility mapping APIs
Used-car and car-plate listing APIs
Chat: conversations, messages, read state, media, realtime delivery
Product/order chat cards and push events
Escrow payment-link validation (allowlist) and status tracking
Order model and state machine: unpaid → shipped → completed / cancelled / refunded
Seller order-management and tracking-submission APIs
Seller notification APIs
Seed data and API documentation for frontend integration

milestones.name: Gate 1 — Seller App internal beta
milestones.exit: Management signs off the end-to-end seller journey on the internal beta.

tasks.text: Frontend–backend integration testing of all seller flows
Fix integration defects found in seller-flow testing
Distribute the Seller App internal beta (TestFlight / internal track)
End-to-end demo: onboard seller → publish product → order → escrow link → ship
Management review and Phase 1 sign-off

phases.name: Phase 2 · Buyer App
phases.goal: Deliver a working Buyer App internal beta that completes the full buyer-to-seller marketplace journey, plus the minimal admin dashboard.

milestones.name: Buyer App UI design — completed
milestones.exit: All Buyer App screens are designed and exported. New design tasks are added here if scope changes.

tasks.text: Splash Screen + Login Page — UI design
Landing Page → Car Model List flow — UI design
Car Model List Overlay — UI design
Category List (English & Chinese) — UI design
Spare Parts — UI design
Accessories Section — UI design
Second Hand Car Page — UI design
Car Plate — UI design
Workshop — UI design
Charge-EV — UI design
Chat — UI design
Community Group — UI design
Review & Report — UI design
User Profile — UI design
Component library — UI design

milestones.name: Buyer App core modules
milestones.exit: A buyer can register, add a car, and find compatible parts on staging.

tasks.text: Splash Screen + Login Page — buyer login and registration
User Profile — profile, settings, and addresses
Landing Page — home and car model list flow
Car Model List Overlay — brand/series/variant/year picker and My Cars
Category List — category browsing in English and Chinese
Spare Parts — listing, detail, compatibility badge, search, filters
Accessories Section — listing, detail, search, filters
Wishlist and favourites
Review & Report — reviews and report submission

milestones.name: Buyer App extended modules
milestones.exit: All buyer journeys work end-to-end against the staging APIs.

tasks.text: Second Hand Car Page — used-car listing, detail, contact seller
Car Plate — listing, detail, contact
Workshop — directory and details
Charge-EV — EV charging stations
Community Group — community links
Seller storefront view
Chat — buyer chat with product/order cards
Chat — escrow payment-link opening and payment-status display
Orders — list, detail, tracking, cancel/refund/return requests
Buyer notifications
Loading, empty, error, offline, and expired-link states

milestones.name: Buyer platform APIs
milestones.exit: All buyer flows are supported by documented APIs.

tasks.text: Buyer profile and My Cars APIs
Catalogue browsing, keyword search, filters, sorting, pagination
Compatibility-filtered search for the selected car
Wishlist, review, and report APIs
Used-car, car-plate, workshop, EV-charging, and community APIs
Buyer chat and seller storefront APIs
Buyer order lifecycle: view, cancel, refund/return requests
Escrow link status events and provider webhook consumption
Buyer notification APIs

milestones.name: Minimal admin dashboard
milestones.exit: Operations can manage users, sellers, listings, and exceptions without database access.

tasks.text: Admin authentication, roles, permissions, and audit logs
User and seller management with verification approval
Product, listing, and content moderation APIs
Order, escrow-exception, and tracking-exception views
Admin web UI for the approved minimal scope

milestones.name: Gate 2 — Buyer App internal beta
milestones.exit: Management signs off the full buyer-to-seller journey on the internal beta.

tasks.text: Cross-app integration testing of the full buyer↔seller journey
Fix integration defects found in buyer-flow testing
Distribute the Buyer App internal beta
End-to-end demo: browse → chat → escrow payment → ship → track → complete
Management review and Phase 2 sign-off

phases.name: Phase 3 · UAT & Launch
phases.time: Months 5–6 · 4 Nov – 18 Dec 2026 · Release by 20 Dec 2026
phases.goal: Harden both apps, run PM-led UAT, and release to production by the 20 December 2026 target.

milestones.name: Integration & regression
milestones.exit: No open critical or high defects from regression.

tasks.text: Full regression of both apps on the agreed device/OS matrix
API contract validation against the OpenAPI specification
Defect triage and fix cycle — frontend
Defect triage and fix cycle — backend
English/Chinese localization QA
UI polish and accessibility pass

milestones.name: Security & performance
milestones.exit: Security and performance findings are resolved or formally accepted.

tasks.text: Security review: authorization, ownership, uploads, rate limits
Webhook signature, idempotency, and duplicate-callback testing
Abuse-case testing: chat abuse, arbitrary links, injection
Load testing: search, chat, and order APIs
App performance profiling: startup, lists, media

milestones.name: User acceptance testing
milestones.exit: Business signs off the UAT results.

tasks.text: Prepare UAT scripts and acceptance criteria
UAT round 1: buyer, seller, and admin journeys
Fix UAT round 1 defects — frontend
Fix UAT round 1 defects — backend
UAT round 2 and regression confirmation
Business sign-off on UAT results

milestones.name: Launch preparation & release
milestones.exit: Both apps are approved in the stores and released to production by 20 Dec 2026.

tasks.text: Production infrastructure, monitoring, alerts, backup/restore
Escrow reconciliation check in the staging environment
Production data seeding: vehicles, categories, initial content
Store listing materials (Google Play & App Store) — designed and handed to frontend
Store listings, screenshots, and privacy declarations
App Store and Play Store review submissions
Migration rehearsal and rollback plan
Launch checklist and go / no-go decision
Public release of the Seller App and Buyer App
